hero.sub: Evidence-based, whole-food, plant-based nutrition – combined with measurable health markers. Quality health, made affordable for everyone.

split.heading: More than just
split.desc: We don't just provide knowledge – we make positive change measurable. With partner labs, daily tracking and your personal Longevity Score, you see exactly how your nutrition affects your health.

cards.title: Lab results & score
cards.desc: All biomarkers in one dashboard. Your Longevity Score tracks your progress in real time.

cards.title: Daily Dozen tracker
cards.desc: Dr. Michael Greger's 12 food groups – track daily, simple to implement.

cards.title: Recipe database
cards.desc: Delicious whole-food dishes matched to your health goals and the Daily Dozen.

cards.title: Shop & packages
cards.desc: Lab test packages and more – quality health made affordable. Easy to book.

items.title: Measure
items.desc: Partner labs analyse your most important health and longevity markers. All results clearly visible in your personal dashboard.

items.title: Nourish
items.desc: Whole-food, plant-based nutrition following Dr. Greger's Daily Dozen. With recipes, tips, and daily tracking built into the app.

items.title: Improve
items.desc: Your Longevity Score shows measurably how your nutrition affects your biomarkers. Clear. Understandable. Motivating.

waitlist.heading: Be there
waitlist.desc: Sign up and be among the first to access the platform – including an exclusive early access discount.
waitlist.success: You're on the waitlist – thank you! We'll be in touch soon.

trust.title: Privacy first
trust.body: Swiss data storage, fully GDPR- & nDSG-compliant.

s1.heading: 1. Controller
s1.intro: The controller within the meaning of the GDPR and the Swiss Data Protection Act (nDSG) is:

waitlist.heading: Waitlist
waitlist.body: When you sign up for our waitlist, we store your email address to inform you about the platform launch. The storage is based on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR / Art. 31 nDSG).

account.heading: User account
account.body: During registration we collect your email address and a password. Additional profile details (e.g. name, date of birth) can be added voluntarily. The legal basis is contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).

health.heading: Health data
health.placeholder: [Placeholder: Description of lab values, biomarkers and Daily Dozen data that users can upload or enter. Legal basis: explicit consent pursuant to Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR.]

auto.heading: Automatically collected data
auto.body: When you visit our website, technically necessary data (IP address, browser, referrer) are stored in server logs for a very short time. This data is not linked to other data.

s3.heading: 3. Analytics (Plausible)
s3.body: We use Plausible Analytics, a privacy-friendly, cookieless analytics solution based in the EU. Plausible sets no cookies, stores no personal data, and is fully GDPR-compliant. No data is shared with third parties.

s4.heading: 4. Data storage (Supabase)
s4.body: Your data is stored in Supabase infrastructure. Our database server is located in the EU (Zurich) region. Supabase processes data according to its privacy policy and acts as a data processor.

s5.heading: 5. Cookies & Local Storage
s5.body: We use strictly necessary cookies to maintain your login session after you sign in. These cookies are essential for the authentication service to function and do not require consent under EU law (Art. 5(3) ePrivacy Directive). We do not use any tracking, advertising, or third-party cookies. Our website analytics are provided by Plausible Analytics, which is fully cookieless and does not collect personal data.

s6.heading: 6. Your rights
rights: Access your stored data (Art. 15 GDPR / Art. 25 nDSG)
Deletion of your data (Art. 17 GDPR / Art. 32 nDSG)
Withdrawal of consent at any time without giving reasons
Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (FDPIC, Switzerland)

s7.heading: 7. Third parties and data sharing
s7.placeholder: [Placeholder: Partner labs, payment providers, and other processors will be listed here once partnerships are established.]

s8.heading: 8. Changes to this policy
s8.body: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy as needed. The current version is always available on this page. For material changes, registered users will be notified by email.

s9.heading: 9. Contact
s9.body: For privacy-related questions, reach us at

s1.heading: 1. Scope
s1.body: These Terms of Service apply to the use of the Evida Life platform, operated by Evida Life AG, Zurich, Switzerland ('Evida Life', 'we', 'us'). By registering or using the platform, you accept these terms.

s2.heading: 2. Service description
s2.intro: Evida Life is a digital health platform offering the following features:
items: Recording and analysis of lab values and biomarkers
Daily Dozen tracker for plant-based nutrition
Recipe database with evidence-based nutritional recommendations
s2.placeholder: [Placeholder: Full service description will be added at app launch.]

s3.heading: 3. User accounts
s3.body: Use of the platform requires registration with a valid email address. You are responsible for the security of your account and the confidentiality of your password. Please notify us immediately of any signs of unauthorised use.

age.heading: Minimum age
age.body: The platform is restricted to persons aged 18 and over. By registering, you confirm that you have reached the minimum age.

s4.heading: 4. Health disclaimer
s4.body: The information, lab evaluations, and nutritional recommendations provided on Evida Life are for informational purposes only and do not replace medical or nutritional advice. Please always consult a specialist for health questions or complaints.

s5.heading: 5. Content and intellectual property
s5.body1: All content created by Evida Life (texts, graphics, recipes, articles) is protected by copyright. Reproduction or distribution without express permission is prohibited.
s5.body2: Content you upload yourself (e.g. lab reports) remains your property. You grant us the right to process it solely to provide our services.

s6.heading: 6. Prohibited use
s6.intro: It is prohibited to use the platform to:
items: compromise the security or integrity of the platform
conduct automated queries without written permission

s7.heading: 7. Availability and liability
s7.body: We strive to keep the platform available at all times but provide no guarantee of uninterrupted availability. Liability for data loss or damage due to outages is excluded to the extent permitted by law.
s7.placeholder: [Placeholder: Full liability provisions under Swiss law will be added after legal review.]

s8.heading: 8. Pricing and subscriptions
s8.placeholder: [Placeholder: Pricing model, subscription periods, cancellation terms, and refund rules will be added before launch.]

s9.heading: 9. Termination
s9.body: You may delete your account at any time without giving reasons. We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts in cases of serious violations of these terms.

s10.heading: 10. Changes to terms
s10.body: We reserve the right to update these Terms of Service. We will notify registered users of material changes by email at least 30 days in advance.

s11.heading: 11. Governing law and jurisdiction
s11.body: Swiss law applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. Jurisdiction is Zurich, Switzerland.

s12.heading: 12. Contact
s12.body: For questions about these Terms of Service, reach us at

s3.heading: Disclaimer
s3.body: The contents of this website have been compiled with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. The information provided on this website does not replace medical or nutritional advice.

s4.heading: Copyright
s4.body: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to Swiss copyright law. Contributions from third parties are identified as such. Reproduction, processing, distribution, and any form of use beyond the limits of copyright law require the written consent of Evida Life AG.

s5.heading: External links
s5.body: This website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. The respective provider is always responsible for the content of linked pages. No legal violations were apparent at the time of linking.
